coverageMatrix.title: Which claim types stay in-plan, escalate, or route out
coverageMatrix.subtitle: Use this matrix to see where Free Start and membership help now, when staff-led escalation can begin, and when a referral or separate legal opt-in applies.

vehicle.title: Vehicle damage
vehicle.description: Launch claim type with a monetary recovery path.

property.title: Property damage
property.description: Launch claim type with a monetary recovery path.

injury.title: Personal injury
injury.description: Launch claim type when a direct monetary recovery path exists.

guidance.title: Guidance-only disputes
guidance.description: Landlord, employment, repair, or contract disputes without direct monetary recovery.

flight.title: Flight delay compensation
flight.description: Visible for scope clarity but still deferred from the launch contract.

footer.title: Boundary note
footer.body: Success-fee escalation starts only after staff accepts a case with a real monetary recovery path. External legal partner action always needs separate written opt-in.
